utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You ... you ... you had sex with Ursula ? !

emotion_cause.span: 1_You ... you ... you had sex with Ursula ? !

utterances.speaker: Eric
utterances.text: Uh , a little bit . She ... she ... she walked in and I thought she was you and I kissed her and

emotion_cause.span: 2_I thought she was you and I kissed her and

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You did not notice she was wearing different clothes ? !

emotion_cause.span: 3_You did not notice she was wearing different clothes ? !

utterances.speaker: Eric
utterances.text: Well I was just so excited to see you .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh . Ew ! Ew ! Ew ! Ugh ! You know what ? This is too weird .

utterances.speaker: Eric
utterances.text: I do not want to lose you !

emotion_cause.span: 7_I do not want to lose you !

utterances.speaker: Eric
utterances.text: It is ... it is like I was saying to Ursula when I was making love to her and I thought she was you ... Yeah it is too weird .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I was making love to her and I thought she was you ... Yeah it is too weird .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So I guess this is it .

utterances.speaker: Eric
utterances.text: Yeah . Maybe it is for the best . You smell just like her .
